description_long: This is a realistic model of a crab, featuring a robust, rounded carapace with a slightly domed shape and a smooth, hard surface. The crab displays two prominent claws (chelae), with one noticeably larger than the other, and four pairs of slender, jointed walking legs on each side. The coloration is primarily a mix of brown, gray, and orange hues, with subtle gradients and natural markings across the shell and limbs. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, providing a wide field of vision. Fine details such as the segmentation of the legs, the texture of the claws, and the subtle sheen of the exoskeleton are clearly visible, giving the crab a lifelike appearance. The underside and joints show lighter, almost whitish tones, contrasting with the darker upper shell.
description: A lifelike crab with a rounded, brownish carapace, two large claws, and eight slender legs, featuring natural color gradients and detailed textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws (with the left claw larger), and the symmetrical arrangement of its legs.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the larger left claw and the segmentation of the walking legs, with the carapace's curvature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the attachment points of the legs, and the overall width of the crab.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the right side, showing the smaller right claw and the detailed leg structure.
